title: ischaemum lanuginosum
intro: Ischaemum lanuginosum, also known as the velvety witchgrass or hairy ischaemum, is a species of grass native to Australia and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. It has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. Ischaemum lanuginosum is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or infused in water, and it is also used in traditional remedies in the form of a paste or poultice.
